data.title: Uber Eats launches Cart Assistant, AI tool for grocery shopping
data.description: The Cart Assistant's AI will build on an Uber Eats user's previous orders to prioritize familiar items. That could mean automatically adding a user's preferred brand of milk or oatmeal to make the experience faster and more personalized.

data.title: Omaha Steaks to open stores, expand fulfillment as it shifts to DTC
data.description: “As we grow our store network and expand our fulfillment capabilities, we’re creating a faster, more convenient way for customers to access our premium proteins,” said Nate Rempe, president and CEO.

data.title: QXO to buy Kodiak for $2.25 billion in technology expansion of building products distribution
data.description: Executives said they expect the largest gains to come from procurement leverage, vendor relationships and technology.

data.title: Lush Cosmetics joins Instacart, offering same-day delivery
data.description: The retailer has timed its partnership ahead of Valentine's Day to offer last-minute gifting options. It said consumers can shop its signature assortment — which includes bath bombs, face masks, body scrubs and shampoo bars — via Instacart.

data.title: Dell integrates Nift tech into retail media network experience
data.description: Dell and Nift began working together on the brand's retail media network in the past six months after about a year of discussions.
